triggers.name: Complex drawdown >= 20-25%
triggers.action: Deploy dry powder into ASML (taxable) + GEV/COPX/MP (IRA).

triggers.name: 2 consecutive quarters hyperscaler capex guided UP
triggers.action: Deploy dry powder immediately into GEV/ASML; abandon the wait-for-dip posture.
triggers.note: Track MSFT/GOOGL/AMZN/META capex guides each earnings season.

queries: Microsoft Google Amazon Meta raise capital expenditure guidance AI data center
watch.fires_when: ≥2 of the big-4 hyperscalers guide capex UP, two quarters running

triggers.name: MP exit: China extends export-control suspension AND NdPr < $80/kg
triggers.action: Cut MP — it becomes a subsidy-floor trade with no scarcity premium.

queries: China rare earth export control suspension extended
neodymium praseodymium NdPr oxide price per kg

triggers.name: LEU exit: Russia enrichment sanctions thaw OR SMR timelines slip materially
triggers.action: Cut LEU — the 2028 cliff and HALEU pull weaken.

queries: Russia uranium enrichment sanctions lifted eased
small modular reactor SMR deployment timeline delay HALEU demand

triggers.name: Turbine lead times roll over (slots opening pre-2029)
triggers.action: Trim GEV/SMNEY — the equipment scarcity is easing.

queries: gas turbine lead times slots availability GE Vernova Siemens Energy
turbine order backlog easing capacity expansion

triggers.name: Memory / CoWoS pricing rolls over in 2027
triggers.action: Trim the tactical compute sleeve (SMH/MU) — cyclical peak.

queries: DRAM HBM memory contract price decline oversupply
TSMC CoWoS advanced packaging capacity pricing 2027

triggers.name: Single name > 2x cost basis AND > ~50x forward
